Response.Say: Hey, what's up. You've reached Stromation. We build custom workflow automations for businesses. So if you've got manual processes eating up your time, like lead follow-ups, invoicing, onboarding, data entry, whatever it is, that's what we fix.
Go ahead and leave your name, your number, and tell me a little about what workflow you're looking to automate. I'll hit you back within a business day.
Looks like we didn't get a message. You can also text this number or hit us up at stromation dot com. Peace.
